arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate’s No Red Card on Bradley Barcola Challenge Leaves Expert Confused
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool are scoreless after the first 45 minutes. The Parisians scored to take a 1-0 lead, but after a VAR review, that goal was taken off due to offside. Nonetheless, the problematic play in the first half came when Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate challenged Bradley Barcola. arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's stunning strike looked to have given PSG a deserved lead in an opening half which they dominated at the Parc des Princes on Wednesday night.

arts.sum: In the 25th minute, the Reds were caught off guard by a cross, leading to a one-on-one situation for the French winger against Alisson.
